Package yams.motorcontrollers

package yams.motorcontrollers
Hardware-agnostic motor controller abstractions for FRC mechanisms.

This package provides a unified API for controlling brushless motor controllers from multiple vendors. All concrete wrappers extend SmartMotorController, which exposes position, velocity, and voltage control modes without reference to any vendor-specific types.

Core types

  • SmartMotorController — the hardware-agnostic abstract base that all vendor wrappers extend. Defines the lifecycle methods (configure, periodic, stop) and the control interface (position, velocity, voltage, duty-cycle setpoints).
  • SmartMotorControllerConfig — a fluent builder used to configure every aspect of a motor before it is applied. Settings include PID gains, feedforward constants, position and velocity software limits, ramp rates, current limits, encoder resolution and offsets, and gear ratios. Call SmartMotorController.configure(config) to push all settings to hardware.
  • SmartMotorControllerCommandRegistry — registers WPILib Command objects that operate a specific motor so they can be discovered and scheduled by a mechanism.

Usage example


 SmartMotorControllerConfig config = new SmartMotorControllerConfig()
     .withPID(0.1, 0.0, 0.001)
     .withCurrentLimit(40)
     .withPositionConversionFactor(2 * Math.PI / 42.0);

 SmartMotorController motor = new SparkWrapper(
     new SparkMax(1, MotorType.kBrushless), DCMotor.getNEO(1), config);
 motor.setPositionSetpoint(Math.PI / 2);

Sub-packages

  • yams.motorcontrollers.local — REV Robotics SPARK MAX and SPARK FLEX wrappers that run closed-loop control on the roboRIO.
  • yams.motorcontrollers.remote — CTRE TalonFX and TalonFXS wrappers that run closed-loop control on the motor controller itself via the Phoenix 6 API.
  • yams.motorcontrollers.simulation — simulation-only implementations used in unit tests and the WPILib simulation GUI.
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    yams.motorcontrollers.local
    REV Robotics motor controller wrappers whose closed-loop control runs on the roboRIO.
    yams.motorcontrollers.remote
    CTRE motor controller wrappers whose closed-loop control runs on the motor controller itself.
    yams.motorcontrollers.simulation
    Physics-based simulation suppliers for YAMS motor controllers.
  • Class
    Description
    SimSupplier
    Provides sim functions for a YAMS simulated mechanism.
    SmartMotorController
    Smart motor controller wrapper for motor controllers.
    SmartMotorController.ClosedLoopControllerSlot
    Current closed loop controller slot.
    SmartMotorControllerCommandRegistry
    Registry for WPILib Command instances associated with a SmartMotorController.
    SmartMotorControllerConfig
    Smart motor controller config.
    SmartMotorControllerConfig.ControlMode
    Control mode for a motor controller.
    SmartMotorControllerConfig.MotorMode
    Idle mode for the SmartMotorController
    SmartMotorControllerConfig.SmartMotorControllerOptions
    All possible options that must be checked and applied during motor config application.
    SmartMotorControllerConfig.TelemetryVerbosity
    Telemetry verbosity for the SmartMotorController
